characters.name: Ace Galvin
characters.description: Ace Galvinis a fictional character on theWingsTV show. He was played by actorRobert Culpof "Greatest American Hero" fame.

characters.name: Al Skoog
characters.description: Al SkoogAs portrayed byStephen Wesley BridgewaterOccupationLawyer and Steam CleanerFirst AppearanceBurnin' Down the House (Part 2)AppearanceBalding with a bad comboverFateNot hired bySandpiper Air Al Skoogwas a local lawyer and steam cleaner onNantucket. He was played byStephen Wesley Bridgewater. WhenJoewas seeking to dissolve hisSandpiperpartnership withBrian, he hired Al Skoog as a lawyer to ensure everything was above board (Burnin' Down the House (Part 2)).

characters.name: Al Whimper
characters.description: Al WhimperAs portrayed byBill GrattonFirst AppearanceAnother WeddingAppearanceOlder and heavysetLikesThe Whale Lodge Al Whimperwas a boring member of theWhale's Lodge. He was played byBill Gratton. Al Whimper was a member of theWhale's Lodgewho metJoe Hackettwhen he visited the lodge in a effort to create some business connections. Al also attendedWalterandRamona'swedding, where he monopolized Joe's time.

characters.name: Albie Morehead
characters.description: Albert "Albie" MoreheadAs portrayed byStuttering John MelendezOccupationOwner ofAlbie's Martini BarFirst AppearanceOlive or TwistRelativesMrs. Morehead (mother)AppearanceChubby with long brown hairPersonalityChildishDislikesHis motherFateWonAlbie's Martini Barin settlement withBrian Albert Morehead (better known asAlbie) was resident ofNantucket. He was played byStuttering John Melendez. Albert "Albie" Morehead was young and immature resident ofNantucketliving with his mother. At the grand opening ofBrian's Martini Bar, Albie handAntoniosome money to get in (cause he saw someone do that in a movie). Albie was the first customer to enter, but he immediately slipped on the floor landing flat on his back and severely injuring his "hinny". Without insurance,BrianandCaseywent to Albie's home to convince him not to sue. When they arrived, Albie assumes they are mad at him and apologized for causing such a scene at the club. In between yelling with his mother, Albie explains that the doctor said he broke his "hinny" and Casey tried to get him to sign a liability waiver in exchange for paying his medical bills and a lifetime pass toBrian's. Albie agreed to sign anything as long as his mother looks at it first. Unfortunately for Brian and Casey, Albie was seemingly award the club in a settlement (Olive or Twist).

characters.name: Alex Lambert
characters.description: Alex LambertAs portrayed byFarrah ForkeOccupationHelicopter Pilot, former Army PilotFirst AppearanceTwo Jerks and a JillRelativesAdele Lambert(mother),Unnamed father,Dwayne Lambert(brother),Three other unnamed brothersAppearanceAttractive brunettePersonalityNo nonsense, tomboyishLikesDaisies,Clint Black, the color greenDislikesJealous guysRelationshipsUnnamed Florida boyfriend of 4 years, Dan (ex-fiancé),Brian Hackett(ex-boyfriend)FateBreaks up withBrianand moves away fromNantucket Alex Lambertwas a helicopter pilot who briefly lived onNantucketand datedBrian Hackett. She was played by the lateFarrah Forke. Alex Lambert grew up with her parents in Florida as their only daughter along with her four brothers (Happy Holidays). While in high school, the Homecoming Queen turn Alex in for smoking, so Alex flushed her tiara down the toilet (Date Package Number Seven). InI've Got A Secret, Alex admits that during her sophomore year of college, she posed naked forPlayboy Magazine's "Girls of the Southeast Conference" pictorial in the April 1986 issue. Alex is still embarrassed about this decision.

characters.name: Andy Fluker
characters.description: Andy FlukerAs portrayed byEric SaietFirst AppearanceGrouses, Houses, and Bickering SpousesRelativesMay Fluker(wife),Unborn twinsAppearanceBrown hair and baldingPersonalityGullibleLikesHonestyFateDidn't purchaseJoeandHelen'sempty lot Andy Flukerand his wifeMaywere a young gullible couple looking to buy land onNantucket. He was played byEric Saiet. Andy and May were a young gullible couple moving toNantucketand in search of a plot of land to build a home and raise their family. After being bilked out of some of the money already, Andy and May were interested in purchasingJoeandHelenempty lot. Although they were prepare to cut them a check, Helen's conscience got the best of her and she hurried them out ofJoe's office(Grouses, Houses, and Bickering Spouses).

characters.name: Antonio Scarpacci
characters.description: Antonio Scarpacciplayed byTony ShalhoubOccupationCab Driver, former WaiterFirst AppearanceLooking For Love In All The Wrong PlacesRelativesAngelo (father), Anna-Maria (mother), Giacomo (cousin), Carmine (uncle), Dominic (cousin), Carlo (uncle), Pollo (uncle), Angelo (cousin),Helen Chapel(ex-wife)AppearanceItalian and clean-cutPersonalityInsecure, self-deprecationLikesBeautiful women, free moneyDislikesBad luck, clamsRelationshipsCasey Chapel(unrequited love interest),Edna (The Big Faced Girl)(on-and-off girlfriend),Sconset Sal(former fiancée)FateContinued driving his cab onNantucketAntonio Scarpacciis a fictional character from the TV-series "Wings." He was played byTony Shalhoub. Antonio Scarpacci is the son of Angelo and Anna-Maria Scarpacci from Positano, Italy. His grandparents were married for eighty-one years, and as a kid, his cherished memento was a yellow blanket. He confesses that growing up his family never had much money. Every Christmas, as a child in Italy, his family would decorate the tree and then carve the traditional Christmas eel.Antonio has a quite large family. He has an unnamed uncle who is a plumber, and an Uncle Carlo, who is a very wealthy, well-to-do cobbler, another uncle named Carmine and an Uncle Paulo, who drove a beat-up old station wagon. One of Antonio's uncles made genuine calfskin gloves in Italy for ten dollars a pair. His Uncle Sal owns a girdle shop. Antonio's Cousin Angelo worked with him atPontrelli'sand was once on television for robbing a convenience store. His Cousin Dominick owns a successful leather business in America, and he has a Cousin Vincenzo with a less than handsome baby whom he is the god-father to. Antonio is charged with the duty to see the the baby is raised as a good Catholic. This gave him motivation to become a better Catholic  himself and began going to Mass every Sunday.At some point, Antonio came to the United States in a small box with his brothers. In Italy, he worked in his Uncle Sal's girdle shop where he introduced hosiery. His first job in America was as the head waiter at Pontrelli's, a local restaurant onNantucket, where he first metJoe HackettandHelen Chapel. Antonio was driven from the restaurant business by a "Dee" (Maitre'd).  He later saw beneath the tux and realized Dee's were just people similar to the waiters. While working at the restaurant, a man died choking on a chicken bone, and his widow sued the restaurant for $500,000. Antonio soon became a cab driver, servicing people to and from the airport. He once briefly worked as a salesman for theWhispering Pines Mortuaryselling coffins and burial plots. For a few days, he was a chauffeur for local businessmanDon D'Carlomaking $500 per day, but he got scared when he believed he was working for a mobster. When António asked about the last driver, Paulie, Don said he bought the farm. When Antonio pressed him about his suspicions, Don explained that Paulie bought a dairy farm and that he was a diamond broker. Don lost trus

When António asked about the last driver, Paulie, Don said he bought the farm. When Antonio pressed him about his suspicions, Don explained that Paulie bought a dairy farm and that he was a diamond broker. Don lost trus

characters.name: Ariel Reed
characters.description: Ariel ReedAs portrayed byMichelle NicastroOccupationCertified Public Accountant (C.P.A.)First AppearanceThe Lady VanishesRelativesUnnamed fatherAppearanceLong brown hair and brown eyesLikesPoetry, Dylan ThomasRelationshipsAntonio Scarpacci(stalker)FateArrested for embezzlement Gretchen Tyler (A.K.A.Ariel Reed) was a woman who likeAntoniobut disappeared before he could ask her out. She was played byMichelle Nicastro. Gretchen Tyler was as certified public accountant (C.P.A.) working inBostonwhen she embezzled $100,000 from Boston Savings and Loans. To escape the police, she took on the alias "Ariel Reed" and hid onNantucket. While at theairport, she metAntonioand shared a connection, but left before if could ask her out. Desperate to find her, Antonio placed an ad in the newspaper, conscripted the crew to help, flew toBostonto track down a shoe store, staked out apublic park, yelled her name through a bullhorn, and posted flyers all over the island. Unfortunately, Antonio found her just before the police found her and arrested her for embezzlement (The Lady Vanishes).

characters.name: Audrey
characters.description: AudreyAs portrayed byKit McDonoughOccupationRealtorFirst AppearanceGrouses, Houses, and Bickering SpousesRelativesPaul (dusband)AppearanceBrown hairFateSold herhometoJoeandHelen Audreywas the realtor who sold herhometoJoeandHelen. She was played byKit McDonough. As a newlywed couple, Audrey and her husband Paul built theirdream homeon ocean front land onNantucket. Years later, Audrey, acting as the realtor, sold her home toJoeandHelen Hackett(Grouses, Houses, and Bickering Spouses).

characters.name: Barbara Farkashevsky
characters.description: Barbara FarkashevskyAs portrayed byStacey PickrenFirst AppearanceAn Affair to ForgetAppearanceClassyFateDoesn't go out with Roy Barbara Farkashevskywas a beautiful woman who travelled onAeromassand caughtRoy's eye. She was played byStacey Pickren. Barbara Farkashevsky was a beautiful woman who travelled onAeromassmultiple times for a few weeks, and she caughtRoy's attention. However, Roy was afraid of approaching her and being turned down, soAntonioandFayvolunteer to help with a makeover. The new Roy did impress Barbara, but after using his opening line repeatedly, Roy was left with nothing to say and gave up (An Affair to Forget).

characters.name: Becky Wilder
characters.description: Becky WilderAs portrayed byOlivia BurnetteOccupationCellistFirst AppearanceDuet for Cello and PlaneRelativesUnnamed motherAppearanceYoung and bright-eyed with long brown hairPersonalityPerkyLikesHer boyfriend, playing the celloDislikesLong-distance relationshipsRelationshipsHer boyfriend, JimmyFatePurposely threw audition forMaine Symphony Orchestra Becky Wilderwas one ofHelen Chapel's former cello students. She was played byOlivia Burnette. Becky Wilder was briefly a cello student ofHelen Chapel, but she quickly progressed beyond Helen's ability to teach (not even lasting a full summer). When Helen was auditioning for theMaine Symphony Orchestra, Becky also audition, but Becky purposely threw the audition so she would be able to stay close to her boyfriend. When she shared this information withJoeand Helen it caused paranoid that was partially responsible for the end of their relationship (Duet for Cello and Plane).

characters.name: Beevo Mather
characters.description: Cousin BeevoCousin Beevo seen from behindOccupationDog GroomerRelativesLowell Mather(cousin)PersonalityOdd Beevo Mather (better known asCousin Beevo) wasLowell Mather's oddball cousin. Although he was frequently mentioned, he never fully appeared in the series. After hearing aboutHelen's engagement toDavis Lynch,Lowelland Beevo stayed up all night making a cross stitched pillow for them. When she broke off the engagement with Davis and got engaged toJoe, Lowell and Beevo made a new cross stitched pillow for them (Whose Wife Is It Anyway).

characters.name: Bella DeBall
characters.description: Bella DeBallAs portrayed byMark DavisOccupationDrag Queen and Contest HostessFirst AppearanceEscape from New YorkAppearanceExtremely lavishPersonalityFriendly, but cattyLikesDragDislikesQuittersRelationshipsHelena Handbasket(drag daughter) Bella DeBallwas a drag queen inNew York City. She was played byMark Davis. While they were stranded inNew York City,HelenandBriansought out shelter in a local drag club and decided to enter Helen into the drag contest to new the money they needed to return home. The contest hostess, Bella DeBall, signed Helen up for the contest and gave her a new name and costum (Escape from New York).

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: BethAs portrayed byKaitlin HopkinsOccupationDepartment Store SuperFirst AppearanceMs. WriteAppearanceLong brown hair and brown eyesRelationshipsBrian Hackett(ex-boyfriend)FateDumped byBrian Bethwas a department store manager who lived onNantucket. She was played byKaitlin Hopkins. Trying to suck up to her for a promotion,Caseytook Beth to lunch inBoston. While at theairport,Briansaw Beth and pestered Casey to set them up. Although she was worry about Brian souring her relationship with Beth, Casey agreed to set them up. Brian and Beth both like each other, but after going on a few dates, Brian dumped Beth because he had fallen in love with "R.", the mysterious writer of letters toKyle Vane(Ms. Write).

characters.name: Brian Hackett
characters.description: Brian Michael HackettAs portrayed bySteven WeberOccupationPilotFirst AppearanceLegacyRelativesDonald Hackett(father),Mae Hackett(mother),Joe Hackett(brother),Carol Hackett(ex-wife),Helen Hackett(sister-in-law),Sarah and Fern (aunts)AppearanceSlender, long brown hair, athletic, often wearing Hawaiian shirtsPersonalityWitty, philandering, casualLikesDating, sex, harassingRoy Biggins, watching TV, over-dubbing Japanese moviesDislikesWorking, rules, commitmentRelationshipsAlex Lambert(ex-girlfriend),Casey Chapel(briefly),Gwen Holmes(former fiancé)FateStayed onNantucketto runSandpiper Air Brian Michael Hackettwas a pilot atSandpiper Airand serial philanderer onNantucket. He was played bySteven Weber. Brian Hackett is the youngest son ofDonald HackettandMae Hackett, and the younger brother by two years ofJoe Hackett. The carefree of the two Hackett brothers, he had a high tendency of irresponsibility that was often a source of consternation to Joe when they were growing up. Because of Joe's adherence to rules and tidiness, Brian used numerous practical jokes trying to get his brother to "loosen up," but as these attempts mostly humiliated Joe, they actually reinforced his buried hostility toward him.

characters.name: Brutus
characters.description: BrutusAs portrayed byRascalOccupationPetFirst AppearanceAirport '90RelativesRoy Biggins(owner)AppearanceEnglish bulldogLikesBeing sensitiveDislikesChihuahuas Brutuswas the pet English bulldog ofRoy Biggins. He seems to have a reputation as a holy terror. Not much is known about Brutus's origins, but Roy seems to have had him a long time, treating him in some unknown manner to make him dangerous to others and sometimes to others. It is known he was banned from the local kennel due to the disappearance of a chihuahua, a charge Roy claims was "trumped up."

characters.name: Budd Bronski
characters.description: Budd BronskiAs portrayed byBrian HaleyOccupationMechanic, former MarineFirst AppearanceSo Long, Frank Lloyd WrongRelativesSergeant Whiskers (pet cat)AppearanceTall, clean cut, and muscularPersonalityPerfectionist and social awkwardLikesPetsDislikesSocial gatheringsFateReplacedLowell Matherasairportfield mechanic Budd Bronskiwas a retired U.S. Marine who replacedLowell Matheras the residentairportfield mechanic servicingSandpiperandAeromass. He was played by comedic actorBrian Haley. Not much is known about Budd Bronski, but he is possibly a native ofNantucket. While he was in the Marines, he had caused an incident that led to a plane going down and wiping out an entire town. He was cleared by a board of inquiry but still wonders whether he tightened a bolt or not.Brianhad hired him over the phone without consultingJoeorRoy, angering them, but they were relieved to learn he would work for the same salary as Lowell did (So Long, Frank Lloyd Wrong).

characters.name: Budd Bronski
characters.description: Budd BronskiAs portrayed byBrian HaleyOccupationMechanic, former MarineFirst AppearanceSo Long, Frank Lloyd WrongRelativesSergeant Whiskers (pet cat)AppearanceTall, clean cut, and muscularPersonalityPerfectionist and social awkwardLikesPetsDislikesSocial gatheringsFateReplacedLowell Matherasairportfield mechanic Budd Bronskiwas a retired U.S. Marine who replacedLowell Matheras the residentairportfield mechanic servicingSandpiperandAeromass. He was played by comedic actorBrian Haley. Not much is known about Budd Bronski, but he is possibly a native ofNantucket. While he was in the Marines, he had caused an incident that led to a plane going down and wiping out an entire town. He was cleared by a board of inquiry but still wonders whether he tightened a bolt or not.Brianhad hired him over the phone without consultingJoeorRoy, angering them, but they were relieved to learn he would work for the same salary as Lowell did (So Long, Frank Lloyd Wrong).

characters.name: Bunny Mather
characters.description: Bunny MatherAs portrayed byLaura InnesFirst AppearanceI Ain't Got No BunnyRelativesLowell Mather(ex-husband),Lowell Mather Jr.(son)PersonalityFlirtatiousLikesPromiscuous sexDislikesMonogamyFateLeavesNantucketafter divorce Bunny Matherwas the promiscuous ex-wife ofLowell Mather. She was played by actressLaura Innes. Bunny Mather is a resident ofNantucketand the wife ofLowell Matherand mother of Lowell Mather Jr.. She is highly promiscuous, sleeping around and having sex with numerous men. She has also made passes toJoe HackettandBrian Hackett. She may have had cosmetic surgery at one time, contributing her looks to a Dr. Parker.

characters.name: Carlton Blanchard
characters.description: Carlton BlanchardAs portrayed byWilliam HickeyOccupationRetiredFirst AppearanceDas PlaneRelativesLewis Blanchard(nephew), brother (name unrevealed)PersonalityObnoxiousLikesAsking questionsRelationshipsJeanette MatherFateUnrevealed Carlton Blanchardwas an eccentric old man with some wealth onNantucketknown for being a nuisance to others. He was played by veteran actorWilliam Hickey. Carlton Blanchard was a wealthy island resident known for annoying people with endless questions, usually starting out with "Why do you think...." He once datedJeanette Mather, the great-aunt ofLowell Mather. He first metJoe HackettandBrian Hackettthrough a contest, conning them into flying them cross-country (Das Plane).

characters.name: Carol Hackett
characters.description: Carol HackettAs portrayed byKim Johnston UlrichOccupationBusiness ProfessionalFirst AppearanceReturn To Nantucket (Part 1)RelativesBrian Hackett(ex-husband),Joe Hackett(ex-brother-in-law/former fiancé)AppearancePretty and blondePersonalitySelfishDislikesSmoked oystersRelationshipsBrian Hackett(ex-husband),Joe Hackett(former fiancé)FateLeftNantucketand disappeared from the Hacketts lives - possibly moved to London Carolwas a former local toNantucket,Brian's ex-wife andJoe's former fiancé. She was played byKim Johnston Ulrich. Carol(maiden name unrevealed) was a former local ofNantucketwho moved away. Her parents once owned the ice cream parlor in town as well as a three-legged blind chihuahua named "Lucky." She attendedSiasconset High SchoolwithJoe Hackett,Brian HackettandHelen Chapeland was often referred to as the most popular girl in school for the majority of her life, although Helen hated her for often humiliating her. As an adult, Helen often called her "Carol the Pig." Carol even once pushed Helen over for getting ice cream on her dress. She may have been one of the reasons thatJoeandBrianfirst started vying for her attention in high school.

characters.name: Carter
characters.description: CarterAs portrayed byPhil BuckmanOccupationManager at Nantucket VideoFirst AppearanceThe Customer's Usually RightRelativesUnnamed father in his 30sAppearanceLong brown hairPersonalitySarcastic Carterwas the manager atNantucket Video. He was played byPhil Buckman. Carter was the manager atNantucket Video. WhenJoecame in on December 24th, 1992 to complain about a 50 cent rewind fee, Carter gently ridiculed him before bringing outDebbieso Joe could yell at her. Because Debbie had seemingly made another error, Carter fired her (The Customer's Usually Right).

characters.name: Casey Chapel
characters.description: Casey DavenportAs portrayed byAmy YasbeckOccupationVariousFirst AppearanceTwisted SisterRelativesPhil Chapel(father),Dee Dee Chapel(mother),Helen Chapel(sister),Lorraine Chapel(sister),Stuart Davenport(estranged husband),Joe Hackett(brother-in-law)AppearanceTall, red hair, attractive with fashionable clothesPersonalityFlighty, insecure, snobbishLikesLilies, fancy French underwear, omelettes by RaoulDislikesBig SandwichRelationshipsStuart Davenport(estranged husband),Brian Hackett(off-again-on-again lover)FateLeft withThe Lunch Counter Cassandra "Casey" Davenport (née Chapel)was the eldest sister ofHelen Chapel. She was played byAmy Yasbeck. Casey Chapel is the older sister ofHelen Chapel. Born in Texas, she later moved toNantucketwhere her father ran the lunch counter at the airport. She was the head cheerleader atSiasconset High Schooland dreamed of being a beautiful super-model when she grew up (Life Could Be a Dream). She eventually lost her Texan accent (Twisted Sister). After meetingStuart Davenport, they were married around 1986 (Love Overboard). As a wealthy heir to a corn pad manufacturing fortune, Stuart was able to keep them in the lap of luxury living in their San Francisco home (Love Overboard).

characters.name: Casey Chapel
characters.description: Casey DavenportAs portrayed byAmy YasbeckOccupationVariousFirst AppearanceTwisted SisterRelativesPhil Chapel(father),Dee Dee Chapel(mother),Helen Chapel(sister),Lorraine Chapel(sister),Stuart Davenport(estranged husband),Joe Hackett(brother-in-law)AppearanceTall, red hair, attractive with fashionable clothesPersonalityFlighty, insecure, snobbishLikesLilies, fancy French underwear, omelettes by RaoulDislikesBig SandwichRelationshipsStuart Davenport(estranged husband),Brian Hackett(off-again-on-again lover)FateLeft withThe Lunch Counter Cassandra "Casey" Davenport (née Chapel)was the eldest sister ofHelen Chapel. She was played byAmy Yasbeck. Casey Chapel is the older sister ofHelen Chapel. Born in Texas, she later moved toNantucketwhere her father ran the lunch counter at the airport. She was the head cheerleader atSiasconset High Schooland dreamed of being a beautiful super-model when she grew up (Life Could Be a Dream). She eventually lost her Texan accent (Twisted Sister). After meetingStuart Davenport, they were married around 1986 (Love Overboard). As a wealthy heir to a corn pad manufacturing fortune, Stuart was able to keep them in the lap of luxury living in their San Francisco home (Love Overboard).

characters.name: Cathy Mohr
characters.description: Cathy MohrAs portrayed byJoanna DanielsOccupationRestaurateurFirst AppearanceWhat About Larry?RelativesLarry Mohr(husband)FateMoved to Miami withLarry Cathy MohrwasLarry's wife. She was played byJoanna Daniels. AfterLarryaccepted the job to buildJoeandHelenhouse, Cathy left him for beingtoodedicated to his work. When she showed at the Hacketts up to drop off his possessions, Joe and Helen were able to get them to reconcile but that also meant they were moving to Miami to open a restaurant (What About Larry?).

characters.name: Chopper
characters.description: ChopperOccupationPetFirst AppearanceThe Key to AlexRelativesAlex Lambert(owner)AppearanceRottweilerDislikesRinging bellsFateUnknown Chopperwas the pet Rottweiler ofAlex Lambert. Chopper wasAlex Lambert's pet Rottweiler dog. According to her, he ate whatever people ate and would sleep anywhere (The Key to Alex).

characters.name: Cindy McGrath
characters.description: Cindy McGrathPlayed byMegan MullallyOccupationCosmetologistFirst AppearanceThere Once Was a Girl From NantucketAppearancePretty redheadPersonalityAirheadedLikesCosmeticsDislikesHer reputation as being "easy"RelationshipsJoe Hackett(ex-boyfriend)FateMoves toBostonnever to return toNantucket Cindy McGrathis a fictional character on the "Wings" TV-series. She was played by television actressMegan Mullally. Cindy McGrath is a native ofNantucketwho worked as the cosmetic counter girl at the local Buy-Rite Drugstore, but she may be better known around town as the island's most popular call girl. She wasn't actually a prostitute, just a very "easy" date.
